items.title: AMD says its Mac Mini-sized Ryzen AI Halo PC starts at $3,999 with Ryzen AI Max 300 chips, for pre-order in June, and unveils AI Max 400 chips, available in Q3 (Devindra Hardawar/Engadget)
items.title_original: AMD says its Mac Mini-sized Ryzen AI Halo PC starts at $3,999 with Ryzen AI Max 300 chips, for pre-order in June, and unveils AI Max 400 chips, available in Q3 (Devindra Hardawar/Engadget)
items.title_en: AMD says its Mac Mini-sized Ryzen AI Halo PC starts at $3,999 with Ryzen AI Max 300 chips, for pre-order in June, and unveils AI Max 400 chips, available in Q3 (Devindra Hardawar/Engadget)
items.title_zh: AMD 表示，配备 Ryzen AI Max 300 芯片的 Mac Mini 尺寸 Ryzen AI Halo PC 起售价为 3,999 美元，将于 6 月预订，并推出 AI Max 400 芯片，将于第三季度上市（Devindra Hardawar/Engadget）

items.title: Cohere releases Command A+, a sparse MoE open model built for agentic tasks, with 218B total and 25B active parameters, its first under the Apache 2.0 license (Carl Franzen/VentureBeat)
items.title_original: Cohere releases Command A+, a sparse MoE open model built for agentic tasks, with 218B total and 25B active parameters, its first under the Apache 2.0 license (Carl Franzen/VentureBeat)
items.title_en: Cohere releases Command A+, a sparse MoE open model built for agentic tasks, with 218B total and 25B active parameters, its first under the Apache 2.0 license (Carl Franzen/VentureBeat)
items.title_zh: Cohere 发布了 Command A+，这是一个为代理任务构建的稀疏 MoE 开放模型，共有 218B 总参数和 25B 活动参数，这是 Apache 2.0 许可证下的第一个模型（Carl Franzen/VentureBeat）
items.title_bilingual: Cohere 发布了 Command A+，这是一个为代理任务构建的稀疏 MoE 开放模型，共有 218B 总参数和 25B 活动参数，这是 Apache 2.0 许可证下的第一个模型（Carl Franzen/VentureBeat） / Cohere releases Command A+, a sparse MoE open model built for agentic tasks, with 218B total and 25B active parameters, its first under the Apache 2.0 license (Carl Franzen/VentureBeat)

items.title: In disclosures to investors, Anthropic says it expects to generate $10.9B in revenue in Q2, vs. $4.8B in Q1, and turn a $559M operating profit, its first ever (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: In disclosures to investors, Anthropic says it expects to generate $10.9B in revenue in Q2, vs. $4.8B in Q1, and turn a $559M operating profit, its first ever (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: In disclosures to investors, Anthropic says it expects to generate $10.9B in revenue in Q2, vs. $4.8B in Q1, and turn a $559M operating profit, its first ever (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 在向投资者披露的信息中，Anthropic 表示，预计第二季度将产生 10.9 亿美元的收入，而第一季度为 4.8 亿美元，并首次实现 5.59 亿美元的营业利润（Berber Jin/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 在向投资者披露的信息中，Anthropic 表示，预计第二季度将产生 10.9 亿美元的收入，而第一季度为 4.8 亿美元，并首次实现 5.59 亿美元的营业利润（Berber Jin/华尔街日报） / In disclosures to investors, Anthropic says it expects to generate $10.9B in revenue in Q2, vs. $4.8B in Q1, and turn a $559M operating profit, its first ever (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)
